common.copyPasteLink: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:

welcome.subject: Welcome to {{ companyName }}!
welcome.title: Welcome to {{ companyName }}, {{ userName }}!
welcome.subtitle: We're excited to have you on board.
welcome.thankYou: Thank you for signing up for {{ companyName }}! We're thrilled to have you as part of our community.
welcome.accountCreated: Your account has been successfully created with the email address:
welcome.gettingStartedIntro: Here are a few things you can do to get started:
welcome.tip1: Complete your profile to personalize your experience
welcome.tip3: Connect with other members of our community
welcome.tip4: Check out our documentation and tutorials
welcome.verificationAction: Please verify your email address by clicking the link we sent to {{ userEmail }}.
welcome.supportIntro: Our support team is here to help you get the most out of {{ companyName }}:
welcome.lookingForward: We're looking forward to seeing what you'll accomplish with {{ companyName }}!
welcome.followUs: Follow us on social media for updates and tips:

reset-password.subject: Reset Your Password
reset-password.title: Password Reset Request
reset-password.subtitle: We received a request to reset your password.
reset-password.body: We received a request to reset the password for your {{ companyName }} account associated with
reset-password.clickToReset: If you made this request, click the button below to reset your password:
reset-password.expirationWarning: This password reset link will expire in {{ expirationHours }} hours for security reasons.
reset-password.ignoreEmail: If you didn't request a password reset, please ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.
reset-password.forAddedSecurity: For added security, you may want to:
reset-password.ensureEmailSecure: Ensure your email account is secure
reset-password.contactSupportSuspicion: Contact our support team if you suspect unauthorized access
reset-password.securityTip1: Choose a strong, unique password that you don't use elsewhere
reset-password.securityTip2: Use a combination of letters, numbers, and special characters
reset-password.securityTip4: Enable two-factor authentication for added security
reset-password.questionsAssistance: If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact our support team at
reset-password.automatedEmail: This is an automated security email. Please do not reply directly to this message.

password-changed.subject: Your Password Has Been Changed
password-changed.title: Password Changed Successfully
password-changed.body: This is to confirm that your password has been successfully changed.
password-changed.secured: Your account is now secured with your new password.
password-changed.unauthorizedWarning: If you didn't authorize this password change, your account may have been compromised. Please contact our support team immediately.
password-changed.securityTip1: Use a unique password that you don't use anywhere else
password-changed.securityTip2: Make sure your password is at least 8 characters long
password-changed.securityTip3: Use a mix of letters, numbers, and special characters

email-change-pending.subject: Email Change Pending Verification
email-change-pending.title: Email Change Requested
email-change-pending.body: We're writing to inform you that a request was made to change the email address associated with your account from {{ oldEmail }} to {{ newEmail }}.
email-change-pending.verificationSent: A verification email has been sent to the new email address. The change will only take effect after the new email is verified.
email-change-pending.secureAccount: If you didn't initiate this email change, please secure your account immediately by clicking the button below:

email-changed.subject: Your Email Address Has Been Changed
email-changed.title: Email Address Changed
email-changed.body: This is to confirm that the email address for your account has been successfully changed from {{ oldEmail }} to {{ newEmail }}.
email-changed.futureEmails: All future account-related emails will be sent to your new email address.
email-changed.unauthorizedWarning: If you didn't authorize this email change, please contact our support team immediately to secure your account.

verify-email-change.subject: Verify Your New Email Address
verify-email-change.title: Verify Your New Email Address
verify-email-change.body: We received a request to change the email address for your account from {{ oldEmail }} to {{ newEmail }}.
verify-email-change.completeChange: To complete this change, please verify your new email address by clicking the button below:
verify-email-change.expirationWarning: This verification link will expire in 24 hours.
verify-email-change.ignoreEmail: If you didn't request this change, please ignore this email or contact our support team immediately.

verify-signup-email.subject: Verify Your Email Address
verify-signup-email.title: Verify Your Email Address
verify-signup-email.body: Thank you for signing up for Hay! To complete your registration, please verify your email address by clicking the button below:
verify-signup-email.expirationWarning: This verification link will expire in 24 hours.
verify-signup-email.ignoreEmail: If you didn't create an account, please ignore this email.

profile-updated.subject: Profile Information Updated
profile-updated.title: Profile Information Updated
profile-updated.body: This is to confirm that your profile information has been updated.
profile-updated.changesSaved: Your changes have been saved successfully.
profile-updated.unauthorizedWarning: If you didn't authorize these changes, please contact our support team immediately to secure your account.

organization-invitation.subject: You've Been Invited!
organization-invitation.title: You've Been Invited!
organization-invitation.body: {{ inviterName }} ({{ inviterEmail }}) has invited you to join {{ organizationName }} on Hay Platform.
organization-invitation.invitedAsRole: You've been invited as a {{ role }}.
organization-invitation.needAccount: You'll need to create an account to accept this invitation.
organization-invitation.expiresAt: This invitation will expire on {{ expiresAt }}.
organization-invitation.ownerDescription: As an Owner, you'll have full administrative access to {{ organizationName }}, including the ability to manage members, settings, and billing.
organization-invitation.adminDescription: As an Admin, you'll have administrative access to {{ organizationName }}, including the ability to manage members and most organization settings.
organization-invitation.contributorDescription: As a Contributor, you'll be able to create and edit content within {{ organizationName }}.
organization-invitation.memberDescription: As a Member, you'll have standard access to {{ organizationName }}'s resources and features.
organization-invitation.viewerDescription: As a Viewer, you'll have read-only access to {{ organizationName }}'s resources.

notification.subject: Notification
notification.receivingBecause: You're receiving this notification because {{ notificationReason }}.
notification.questionsContact: If you have any questions, please contact us at

privacy-export-request.subject: Verify Your Data Export Request
privacy-export-request.title: Verify Your Data Export Request
privacy-export-request.body: We received a request to export your personal data from {{ companyName }}. To confirm this request and ensure your data security, please verify your identity by clicking the button below.
privacy-export-request.info1: This verification link will expire in {{ expiresIn }}
privacy-export-request.info2: After verification, we'll process your data export request
privacy-export-request.info3: You'll receive a download link when your export is ready
privacy-export-request.info4: If you didn't request this export, please ignore this email
privacy-export-request.gdprNote: This is an automated message related to your GDPR data subject rights. If you didn't request this data export, you can safely ignore this email.

privacy-export-ready.subject: Your Data Export is Ready
privacy-export-ready.title: Your Data Export is Ready
privacy-export-ready.body: Good news! Your personal data export from {{ companyName }} has been successfully generated and is ready for download.
privacy-export-ready.info1: This download link will expire in {{ expiresIn }}
privacy-export-ready.info2: Your export includes all personal data we have on file
privacy-export-ready.info3: The data is provided in JSON format
privacy-export-ready.info4: Please store this file securely as it contains your personal information

privacy-deletion-request.subject: Verify Your Data Deletion Request
privacy-deletion-request.title: Verify Data Deletion Request
privacy-deletion-request.body: We received a request to permanently delete your account and personal data from {{ companyName }}. This is a serious action that cannot be undone.
privacy-deletion-request.warning: WARNING: This action is permanent and irreversible
privacy-deletion-request.deleted1: Your account will be permanently deactivated
privacy-deletion-request.deleted2: All API keys will be revoked
privacy-deletion-request.deleted4: Account audit logs will be retained (anonymized) for compliance
privacy-deletion-request.deleted5: This verification link will expire in {{ expiresIn }}
privacy-deletion-request.didntRequest: If you didn't request this deletion, please ignore this email and contact support immediately.

privacy-deletion-complete.subject: Your Data Has Been Deleted
privacy-deletion-complete.title: Data Deletion Completed
privacy-deletion-complete.body: This confirms that your personal data has been successfully deleted from {{ companyName }} as requested.
privacy-deletion-complete.done1: Your account has been permanently deactivated
privacy-deletion-complete.done2: All API keys have been revoked
privacy-deletion-complete.done3: Personal information has been removed or anonymized
privacy-deletion-complete.done4: You can no longer access your account
privacy-deletion-complete.note1: Some audit logs have been retained (anonymized) for legal and compliance requirements
privacy-deletion-complete.note2: If you create a new account with the same email address, it will be treated as a completely new account
privacy-deletion-complete.note3: Backup copies in our disaster recovery systems will be deleted as part of our regular backup rotation (within 90 days)
privacy-deletion-complete.thankYou: Thank you for using {{ companyName }}. If you have any questions about this deletion, please contact our support team.
